description_long: This is a beaded bracelet composed of uniformly sized, matte black spherical beads strung together in a circular arrangement. The centerpiece is a cylindrical black bead with a textured, grid-like surface, flanked by two large marbled beads featuring swirling patterns of red, white, and gray. On either side of the marbled beads are smooth, glossy orange beads and smaller metallic red spacer beads, adding vibrant contrast to the overall design. The bracelet is finished with a small, metallic clasp that secures the ends together. The combination of matte and glossy finishes, along with the interplay of solid and marbled colors, gives the piece a striking, urban-inspired aesthetic. The bracelet appears flexible and lightweight, suitable for everyday wear in a city environment.
description: A circular beaded bracelet with matte black beads, a textured black centerpiece, marbled red-and-white accent beads, and glossy orange details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full arrangement of beads, highlighting the central textured black bead and the symmetrical placement of marbled and orange beads.
description_view_1: Angled side view emphasizes the depth and roundness of the beads, with the marbled and orange beads more prominent on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the metallic clasp and the symmetry of the bead arrangement, with the central bead less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the marbled and orange beads on the right, with the central bead partially obscured.
